title: Construction. These Rules shall be liberally construed to carry out the
content: 6 objectives of the Constitution, R.A. Nos. 11641 and 12021 and their IRRs, and other laws 7 pertaining to overseas employment, and to assist the parties in obtaining just, expeditious 8 and inexpensive settlement of disputes. 9 10 All doubts in the implementation or interpretation of these Rules shall be resolved in favor 11 of labor. 12 13
